summary: Full e2e testing of StockSense - 19 backend tests all pass. Frontend tested across all pages. Most features work correctly. Found 1 critical bug (Predicted Revenue always ₹0 due to field name mismatch) and a few minor issues.

minor.issue: Field name inconsistency: cache returns 'predicted_demand' but run_prediction returns 'total_predicted_demand' via **pred spread. Frontend uses p.total_predicted_demand which is undefined when reading from cache.

ui_bugs.issue: Always shows ₹0 because Dashboard.js uses p.total_predicted_demand but API returns p.predicted_demand (from cache). Fix: change Dashboard.js line 110 to use (p.predicted_demand || p.total_predicted_demand || 0)
Chart appears almost empty/sparse. Only shows bars for days with recent sales activity. Not a bug per se, but low visual impact.

issues: Historical data line appears flat at 0 for most of the visible range; predicted data (dashed) shows future values. This is expected for 30D/90D range when data is sparse.

action_items: Fix Predicted Revenue KPI: in backend server.py line 630, rename the field stored in cache from 'predicted_demand' to 'total_predicted_demand' OR fix frontend Dashboard.js line 110 to use (p.predicted_demand || p.total_predicted_demand || 0). Root cause: Backend stores cache as 'predicted_demand' but run_prediction() returns 'total_predicted_demand' -- inconsistent naming.
AI Insights panel loads correctly (5 insights from GPT-4o) but loads after page render - verify UX shows loading spinner
critical_code_review_comments: server.py line 630: prediction_cache stores 'predicted_demand' but run_prediction() returns dict with key 'total_predicted_demand'. The **pred spread on line 650 (non-cached path) uses 'total_predicted_demand', but cached path (line 630) returns 'predicted_demand'. This inconsistency causes frontend to always get 0 predicted revenue when cache is populated.
Dashboard URL is at root '/' not '/dashboard' - wait_for_url tests expecting **/dashboard** will fail (minor test concern).
server.py is 713 lines - consider splitting into separate route modules for maintainability.

success_rate.frontend: 90% (most features work; Predicted Revenue ₹0 is visible bug)

seed_data_creation: Created 2 test products via API: TEST_Product_Widget (TEST-SKU-001), TEST_UpdateProduct (TEST-SKU-002). Created 1 test supplier: TEST_Supplier.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend all passing. Dashboard loads at root '/' not '/dashboard'. Main bug is Predicted Revenue KPI showing ₹0. All other pages (Inventory, Alerts, Predictions, Sales, Suppliers, Categories, Settings) work correctly. AI Insights API works and returns 5 insights. Inventory table loads 20+ products with all required columns.

rca_of_issue.root_cause: In /api/predictions endpoint, when prediction_cache exists, it returns 'predicted_demand' (line 630). But when cache is absent, run_prediction() spreads its result which has key 'total_predicted_demand' (line 650). Frontend Dashboard.js line 110 exclusively uses p.total_predicted_demand. Since cache is populated after first load, subsequent loads always use cached 'predicted_demand' which is undefined in frontend. Result: 0 * selling_price = 0.
rca_of_issue.fix: Option 1: In server.py line 630, change 'predicted_demand': cache.get('predicted_demand', 0) to 'total_predicted_demand': cache.get('predicted_demand', 0). Option 2: Fix Dashboard.js to use (p.total_predicted_demand || p.predicted_demand || 0).
